ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ad_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the ad interaction */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the ad */,
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the advertiser of the ad */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender of the user who interacted with the ad */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city of the user who interacted with the ad */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the ad */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per click for the ad */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of ad impressions */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the ad */,
  "ad_type" TEXT /* Type of the ad (e.g., banner, video, text) */,
  "ad_size" TEXT /* Size of the ad (e.g., 300x250, 728x90) */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the campaign */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the user */,
  "user_age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "user_interests" TEXT /* User interests (e.g., sports, technology) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_advertiser_id FOREIGN KEY ("advertiser_id") REFERENCES advertisers ("advertiser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "publisher_url" TEXT /* URL of the publisher's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the publisher was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the publisher's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisers" (
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertiser */,
  "advertiser_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertiser */,
  "advertiser_url" TEXT /* URL of the advertiser's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the advertiser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the advertiser was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the advertiser's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advertiser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender type (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clicks" (
  "click_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each click event */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ad performance record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the click event */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the click originated */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender of the user who clicked */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who clicked */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* URL of the page the user came from before clicking the ad */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("click_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clicks_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clicks_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES ad_performance ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clicks_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
